extDescription.message: Translate selected text with multiple sources, Webpage translating that have 3 display modes... An all-in-one translation extension.

extCallOutCommandDescription.message: Call out extension in web page

extToggleAutoInsertResultDescription.message: Toggle the option of "insert translate results in web pages automatically"

extSwitchWTDisplayModeDescription.message: Switch the display mode of webpage translations inside the webpage

extTogglePageTranslationStateDescription.message: Toggle the page translation state of current page

optionsShowButtonAfterSelectDescription.message: When you select some text and release the left mouse button, the buttons you checked below will be displayed. The order of the buttons is related to the order in which you checked. If you don't want to show any buttons, just uncheck all the buttons.

optionsTranslateWithKeyPress.message: Press "Ctrl" key and select text to translate

optionsTranslateEnglishOnlyDescription.message: When enabled, only text detected as English is translated (floating button and popup). Webpage translation is not affected. If source language is set explicitly, only "English" is translated.

optionsPreferredLanguageDescription.message: When the target language of translation is "auto", it will be translated into the "preferred language". When the language of the text is the same as the "preferred language", it will be translated into "second preferred Language".

optionsCallOutCommandDescription.message: You can call out extension in web page when the extension is enabled in web page with this keyboard shortcut. When you click this keyboard shortcut with the extension called out, it focuses on the text box.

optionsPinThePanelWhileOpeningIt.message: Pin the panel while opening it

optionsPinThePanelWhileOpeningItDescript.message: The panel will be pinned automatically while translating or the shortcut of "Call out extension in web page" is used.

optionsRememberPositionOfPinnedPanel.message: Remember the position of the pinned panel

optionsRememberPositionOfPinnedPanelDesc.message: When you click the pin icon in the unpinned state of the panel, it will automatically move to the last pinned position. Moving the panel in the pinned state will automatically synchronize the current position to all pages.

optionsDoNotRespondInTextBox.message: Do not translate inside input fields

optionsDoNotRespondInTextBoxDescription.message: When focus is in an input, textarea, or contenteditable area, the extension will not show the translate button, auto-translate, or keyboard-shortcut translate.

optionsAutoTranslateAfterInput.message: Auto translate after input in input box

optionsAutoTranslateAfterInputDescriptio.message: Extension will send a translate request automatically with the text you input in input box in 0.6s. If you disable it, you will need to use "Ctrl + Enter" keyboard shortcut to trigger the translate request.

optionsContextMenusDescription.message: Drag to reorder and enable or disable context menu items.

optionsEnableInsertResult.message: Allow extension to insert translate results in web pages

optionsEnableInsertResultDescription.message: When you enable this option and the result can be inserted, there will be an "insert" icon behind the translate result. After clicking the icon, extension will insert the translate result behind the text you selected. Clicking the icon again will remove the previously inserted translate result.

optionsBeta.message: This function may not be fully developed, and there may be compatibility and destructive issues. If you want to report a bug or make a feature suggestion, please contact the developer.

optionsAutoInsertResult.message: Insert translate results in web pages automatically

optionsAutoInsertResultDescription.message: After enabling this option, the extension will insert translate result in web page automatically when the translate request is completed and can be inserted. You can toggle this option through "Toggle the option of 'insert translate results in web pages automatically'" keyboard shortcut.

optionsDisplayMode.message: The display mode of translate results

optionsWebPageTranslatingDescription.message: "Webpage translating" is a feature that can translate the whole webpage with the language you want. You can activate webpage translating through context menu or keyboard shortcut. After activating webpage translating, there will be a control bar in the bottom right corner of the page.

optionsMultipleTranslateSourceListDescri.message: The source you check will be displayed in panel by default. The order of the sources is related to the order in which you checked.

optionsCustomTranslateSourceDescription.message: You can add custom translate sources which built by yourself or others.

optionsCustomTranslateSourceLearn.message: Learn more about custom translate source.

optionsDisplayOfTranslationDescription.message: You can decide what content will be displayed on the translation panel.

optionsCustomWebpageTranslateSourceDescr.message: You can add custom webpage translate sources which built by yourself or others.

optionsCustomWebpageTranslateSourceLearn.message: Learn more about custom webpage translate source.

optionsEnableAutoTranslateWebpageDescrip.message: When enabled, the "Enable/Disable automatic translation on this website" button appears on the control bar. When you visit a website in the domain name list below, the page will be automatically translated.

optionsTogglePageTranslationStateDescrip.message: When this keyboard shortcut is used on an extension enabled page, you can activate page translation while it is not activated, or close it while it is activated.

optionsSpecifyTranslate.message: Specify what to translate or not translate

optionsEnterURLFilterMatchedRules.message: Enter a URL to filter matched rules

optionsMatchURLsDescription.message: No need http(s):// prefix; Support wildcard(*) and terminator($$); Use (,) to separate;

optionsMatchPatternError.message: After preprocessing, the value of the matching pattern is empty.

optionsNotValidSelectorError.message: It is not a valid selector.

contentSwitchDisplayModeOfResult.message: Switch the display mode of translate results

contentAddToCollection.message: Add the current translation(s) to collection

contentEnableAutoTranslationOnThisSite.message: Enable automatic translation on this website

contentDisableAutoTranslationOnThisSite.message: Disable automatic translation on this website

contentUpdateToCollection.message: Update the current translation(s) to collection

collectionConfirmingDelete.message: The checked items will be deleted.

collectionConfirmRemoveTag.message: This tag will be removed from the following items.

sentenceBingHttp429.message: (Too Many Requests) You may need to go to the official website to translate and complete the verification before you can continue to use it. Official website:

errorCode_RESULT_ERROR.message: Error: Server return an unexpected result.

errorCode_LANGUAGE_NOT_SOPPORTED.message: Error: The translate source doesn't support this language.

errorCode_EXTENSION_UPDATED.message: Error: Extension might be updated, try refreshing page to reactivate extension.

errorCode_SKIP_NON_ENGLISH.message: Skipped: source text is not English (English-only mode is on).

browserAIUnavailable.message: Browser AI is unavailable for your browser.

promptHelperText.message: {target} -> Target language; {text} -> The text to be translated;

confirmDeleteService.message: The filled data will not be retained

thirdPartyServicesDescription.message: When the third-party service you use does not provide language detection, the browser's built-in language detection will be used (with low accuracy).

openaiDescription.message: This service is identical to ChatGPT by default and can be used to add AI services compatible with the OpenAI REST API.

hoverHighlighted.message: Display the translation when the mouse hovers over the highlighted text
